qa_pairs.question: What is the policy number for this final expense policy?
qa_pairs.evidence: Policy #: CC-FE-2024-9903

qa_pairs.question: What is the benefit amount of this policy?
qa_pairs.evidence: Benefit Amount: $10,000

qa_pairs.question: What is the monthly premium?
qa_pairs.evidence: Monthly Premium: $87.50 (guaranteed level for life)

qa_pairs.question: What is the insured's age?
qa_pairs.evidence: Age: 72 years

qa_pairs.question: What is the effective date of this policy?
qa_pairs.evidence: Effective: May 1, 2024

qa_pairs.question: What percentage of the face amount is paid if death occurs during Year 1?
qa_pairs.answer: 30% of face amount ($3,000) plus all premiums paid
qa_pairs.evidence: During Year 1 (before May 1, 2025): We pay 30% of face amount ($3,000) plus all premiums paid

qa_pairs.question: What percentage of the face amount is paid if death occurs during Year 2?
qa_pairs.answer: 70% of face amount ($7,000) plus all premiums paid
qa_pairs.evidence: During Year 2 (May 1, 2025 - April 30, 2026): We pay 70% of face amount ($7,000) plus all premiums paid

qa_pairs.question: What is the approximate cash value after 10 years?
qa_pairs.evidence: 4.2 Approximate cash value after 10 years: $3,200

qa_pairs.question: What is the grace period for this policy?
qa_pairs.evidence: 3.4 GRACE PERIOD: If payment is not received, you have 30 days to pay before the policy cancels.

qa_pairs.question: What is the age range for eligibility under this policy?
qa_pairs.evidence: 9.2 AGE LIMITS: Coverage is available for ages 50-85.

qa_pairs.question: What is the free look period?
qa_pairs.evidence: 7.1 30-DAY FREE LOOK: You can cancel within 30 days of receiving this policy for a full refund.

qa_pairs.question: What company issued this final expense policy?
qa_pairs.evidence: ComfortCare Senior Insurance

qa_pairs.question: Who is the primary beneficiary of this policy?
qa_pairs.evidence: Primary: Linda Sue Johnson (Daughter) - 100%

qa_pairs.question: Who is the insured person on this policy?
qa_pairs.evidence: Name: Dorothy Mae Johnson

qa_pairs.question: Who is the premium payer on this policy?
qa_pairs.evidence: Premium Payer: Dorothy Mae Johnson

qa_pairs.question: What address should claims be mailed to?
qa_pairs.answer: ComfortCare Claims, P.O. Box 777, Tampa, FL 33601
qa_pairs.evidence: Mail to: ComfortCare Claims, P.O. Box 777, Tampa, FL 33601

qa_pairs.question: Within how many business days will valid claims be paid?
qa_pairs.evidence: We will pay valid claims within 5 business days.

qa_pairs.question: If death results from an accident at any time, what benefit is paid?
qa_pairs.answer: The full benefit amount ($10,000) is paid immediately, plus all premiums paid.
qa_pairs.evidence: EXCEPTION - ACCIDENTAL DEATH: If death results from an accident at any time, we pay the full benefit amount immediately, plus all premiums paid.

qa_pairs.question: What is paid if the insured dies by suicide within 2 years of the issue date?
qa_pairs.answer: Only the premiums paid are returned; no death benefit is payable.
qa_pairs.evidence: 5.1 SUICIDE: If death occurs by suicide within 2 years of the issue date, we will only return the premiums paid.

qa_pairs.question: What happens after 2 years if the policy owner stops paying premiums?
qa_pairs.answer: The policy automatically continues with a reduced benefit amount based on the cash value; no further premiums are needed.
qa_pairs.evidence: 8.1 After 2 years, if you stop paying premiums, your policy will automatically continue with a reduced benefit amount based on the cash value. No further premiums needed.

qa_pairs.question: After the policy has been in force for 2 years, can the insurer cancel it except for non-payment?
qa_pairs.answer: No. After 2 years, the insurer cannot cancel the policy or deny claims except for non-payment of premiums.
qa_pairs.evidence: 9.3 INCONTESTABILITY: After this policy has been in force for 2 years, we cannot cancel it or deny claims except for non-payment of premiums.

qa_pairs.question: Under what conditions is an accidental death recognized for the full benefit?
qa_pairs.answer: An accident must be a sudden, unexpected event causing injury that results in death within 90 days of the event.
qa_pairs.evidence: An accident means a sudden, unexpected event causing injury that results in death within 90 days of the event.

qa_pairs.question: Within what period may the insured restart the policy after it lapses?
qa_pairs.answer: Within 2 years by paying missed premiums with interest.
qa_pairs.evidence: 8.3 You may restart your policy within 2 years by paying missed premiums with interest.

qa_pairs.question: If the insured dies on June 1, 2024 (during Year 1) and death is not accidental, how much will the beneficiary receive?
qa_pairs.answer: 30% of the face amount ($3,000) plus all premiums paid to date.
qa_pairs.evidence: During Year 1 (before May 1, 2025): We pay 30% of face amount ($3,000) plus all premiums paid / EXCEPTION - ACCIDENTAL DEATH: If death results from an accident at any time, we pay the full benefit amount immediately, plus all premiums paid.

qa_pairs.question: Does this policy exclude war, aviation, or travel? What about suicide?
qa_pairs.answer: There is no war exclusion, no aviation exclusion, and no travel restrictions. The only exclusion is suicide within 2 years of issue, which limits payment to premiums paid only.
qa_pairs.evidence: 5.2 NO OTHER EXCLUSIONS: This policy has no war exclusion, no aviation exclusion, and no travel restrictions. / 5.1 SUICIDE: If death occurs by suicide within 2 years of the issue date, we will only return the premiums paid.

qa_pairs.question: If the insured dies accidentally during Year 2, what does the beneficiary receive — graded benefit or full benefit?
qa_pairs.answer: The full benefit amount ($10,000) plus all premiums paid, because accidental death at any time triggers the full benefit regardless of the graded benefit schedule.
qa_pairs.evidence: During Year 2 (May 1, 2025 - April 30, 2026): We pay 70% of face amount ($7,000) plus all premiums paid / EXCEPTION - ACCIDENTAL DEATH: If death results from an accident at any time, we pay the full benefit amount immediately, plus all premiums paid.
